title: Add setup() Input Validation in core.lua
summary: Added setup() input validation in core.lua with validate_opts() helper that validates: enabled (boolean), refresh_time (>=1000), persist (boolean), schedule (array with valid entries), default.background (light/dark/system), and system_background_detection (function or non-empty string array). Returns early with vim.notify error on invalid input without modifying config. Includes 5 validation tests. Also added MS_PER_MINUTE constant (coordinating with task-10).

tests: 8 passing core tests including 5 validation tests
